name: developerknowledge_get_documents
description: Use this tool to retrieve the full content of a single document or up to 20 documents in a single call. The document names should be obtained from the `parent` field of results from a call to the `search_documents` tool. Set the `names` parameter to a list of document names.

names.description: Required. The names of the documents to retrieve, as returned by search_documents. A maximum of 20 documents can be retrieved in one call. The documents are returned in the same order as the `names` in the request. Format: `documents/{uri_without_scheme}` Example: `documents/docs.cloud.google.com/storage/docs/creating-buckets`

Document.description: A Document represents a piece of content from the Developer Knowledge corpus.

content.description: Output only. The content of the document in Markdown format.

description.description: Output only. A description of the document.

name.description: Identifier. The resource name of the document. Format: `documents/{uri_without_scheme}` Example: `documents/docs.cloud.google.com/storage/docs/creating-buckets`

title.description: Output only. The title of the document.

uri.description: Output only. The URI of the content, such as `https://cloud.google.com/storage/docs/creating-buckets`.
